title: ophrys fusca subsp. phaseliana
intro: Ophrys fusca subsp. phaseliana, also known as the Phaesian Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The Phaesian Bee Orchid is a type of orchid that has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. The plant's health benefits include alleviating coughs, relieving congestion, and soothing inflammation. The herbal preparations of the Phaesian Bee Orchid include infusions and decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which are traditionally used to create teas and remedies for respiratory ailments.
